languages.text: Отряды бойцов поднимаются на борт шаттлов и отправляются навстречу неизвестному. После долгого молчания {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}вокс{/g} оживает, и капитан отряда докладывает обстановку. В зоне стыковки царят мрак и давящая тишина, изредка пронзаемая стоном переборок судна.

traits.locale_text: Отряды бойцов поднимаются на борт шаттлов и отправляются навстречу неизвестному. После долгого молчания {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}вокс{/g} оживает, и капитан отряда докладывает обстановку. В зоне стыковки царят мрак и давящая тишина, изредка пронзаемая стоном переборок судна.

languages.text: Squads of fighters board shuttles and set off to face the unknown. After a protracted silence, the {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}vox{/g} crackles to life as the squad captain calls in his report on the situation. The docking area is dark and oppressively silent, with occasional groans from the ship's bulkheads.
languages.original_text: Отряды бойцов поднимаются на борт шаттлов и отправляются навстречу неизвестному. После долгого молчания {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}вокс{/g} оживает, и капитан отряда докладывает обстановку. В зоне стыковки царят мрак и давящая тишина, изредка пронзаемая стоном переборок судна.

After a protracted silence, the {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}vox{/g} crackles to life as the squad captain calls in his report on the situation. Squads of fighters board shuttles and set off to face the unknown. After a protracted silence, the {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}vox{/g} crackles to life as the squad captain calls in his report on the situation. The docking area is dark and oppressively silent, with occasional groans from the ship's bulkheads.

languages.text: 战斗小队登上穿梭机，前去面对未知。长久的死寂之后，{g|Encyclopedia:Vox}音阵{/g}终于噼啪响起，小队队长汇报了当前情况。对接区域漆黑一片，安静得令人窒息，只能听见船只舱壁偶尔发出的呻吟声。
languages.original_text: Squads of fighters board shuttles and set off to face the unknown. After a protracted silence, the {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}vox{/g} crackles to life as the squad captain calls in his report on the situation. The docking area is dark and oppressively silent, with occasional groans from the ship's bulkheads.

traits.locale_text: 战斗小队登上穿梭机，前去面对未知。长久的死寂之后，{g|Encyclopedia:Vox}音阵{/g}终于噼啪响起，小队队长汇报了当前情况。对接区域漆黑一片，安静得令人窒息，只能听见船只舱壁偶尔发出的呻吟声。

languages.text: Unas escuadras de guerreros montan en lanzaderas y parten hacia lo desconocido. Tras un silencio prolongado, el {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}voco{/g} cobra vida con un chisporroteo cuando el capitán llama para transmitir su informe de situación. La bahía de aterrizaje está oscura y en silencio sepulcral, excepto por los quejidos ocasionales de las mamparas de la nave.
languages.original_text: Squads of fighters board shuttles and set off to face the unknown. After a protracted silence, the {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}vox{/g} crackles to life as the squad captain calls in his report on the situation. The docking area is dark and oppressively silent, with occasional groans from the ship's bulkheads.

traits.locale_text: Unas escuadras de guerreros montan en lanzaderas y parten hacia lo desconocido. Tras un silencio prolongado, el {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}voco{/g} cobra vida con un chisporroteo cuando el capitán llama para transmitir su informe de situación. La bahía de aterrizaje está oscura y en silencio sepulcral, excepto por los quejidos ocasionales de las mamparas de la nave.

languages.text: Des escouades de combattants montent dans des navettes et partent pour l'inconnu. Après un long silence, le {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}vox{/g} revient à la vie dans un crépitement tandis que le capitaine d'escouade prend la parole pour faire son rapport. La zone d'amarrage est plongée dans la pénombre et dans un silence oppressant, perturbé de temps à autre par les grincements des cloisons.
languages.original_text: Squads of fighters board shuttles and set off to face the unknown. After a protracted silence, the {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}vox{/g} crackles to life as the squad captain calls in his report on the situation. The docking area is dark and oppressively silent, with occasional groans from the ship's bulkheads.

traits.locale_text: Des escouades de combattants montent dans des navettes et partent pour l'inconnu. Après un long silence, le {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}vox{/g} revient à la vie dans un crépitement tandis que le capitaine d'escouade prend la parole pour faire son rapport. La zone d'amarrage est plongée dans la pénombre et dans un silence oppressant, perturbé de temps à autre par les grincements des cloisons.

languages.text: Mangalar mekiklere biniyor ve bilinmeyenle yüzleşmek üzere yola çıkıyor. Uzun süren bir sessizlikten sonra, yüzbaşı durum raporunu verirken {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}voks{/g} cızırtıyla canlanıyor. Kenetlenme bölgesi, karanlık ve boğucu derecede sessiz. Geminin bölmelerinden ara sıra iniltiler geliyor.
languages.original_text: Squads of fighters board shuttles and set off to face the unknown. After a protracted silence, the {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}vox{/g} crackles to life as the squad captain calls in his report on the situation. The docking area is dark and oppressively silent, with occasional groans from the ship's bulkheads.

traits.locale_text: Mangalar mekiklere biniyor ve bilinmeyenle yüzleşmek üzere yola çıkıyor. Uzun süren bir sessizlikten sonra, yüzbaşı durum raporunu verirken {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}voks{/g} cızırtıyla canlanıyor. Kenetlenme bölgesi, karanlık ve boğucu derecede sessiz. Geminin bölmelerinden ara sıra iniltiler geliyor.

languages.text: Mehrere Shuttles mit Kämpfern brechen zu einer ungewissen Reise auf. Nach einer quälenden Stille erwacht das {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}Vox{/g} zum Leben, als der Captain des Trupps seinen Lagebericht abgibt. Im völlig dunklen Landebereich herrscht eine bedrückende Stille, die nur vom gelegentlichen Knirschen der Schotten des Schiffs gestört wird.
languages.original_text: Squads of fighters board shuttles and set off to face the unknown. After a protracted silence, the {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}vox{/g} crackles to life as the squad captain calls in his report on the situation. The docking area is dark and oppressively silent, with occasional groans from the ship's bulkheads.

traits.locale_text: Mehrere Shuttles mit Kämpfern brechen zu einer ungewissen Reise auf. Nach einer quälenden Stille erwacht das {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}Vox{/g} zum Leben, als der Captain des Trupps seinen Lagebericht abgibt. Im völlig dunklen Landebereich herrscht eine bedrückende Stille, die nur vom gelegentlichen Knirschen der Schotten des Schiffs gestört wird.

languages.text: 戦闘機隊は輸送機に乗り込み、未知の世界へと向かう。長い沈黙の後、{g|Encyclopedia:Vox}ヴォックス{/g}が起動し、隊長の報告が聞こえてくる。ドッキングエリアは暗く、不気味な静けさ。時々、船体の壁から唸り声が聞こえる。
languages.original_text: Squads of fighters board shuttles and set off to face the unknown. After a protracted silence, the {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}vox{/g} crackles to life as the squad captain calls in his report on the situation. The docking area is dark and oppressively silent, with occasional groans from the ship's bulkheads.

traits.locale_text: 戦闘機隊は輸送機に乗り込み、未知の世界へと向かう。長い沈黙の後、{g|Encyclopedia:Vox}ヴォックス{/g}が起動し、隊長の報告が聞こえてくる。ドッキングエリアは暗く、不気味な静けさ。時々、船体の壁から唸り声が聞こえる。
